subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down by the Lord of Hosts as a bounty from His presence, and verily He is the All-Bountiful, the Most Generous. Hearken unto the Call from the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله رب الجنود فضلا من عنده و هو الفضال الکریم اسمع الندآء من الافق
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for nearness to God
